postData.contentHtml:
Manila is abuzz with excitement as Cuban-American actor Jason Canela prepares to step into the iconic role of Emilio Estefan in the Philippine staging of the Broadway musical "On Your Feet!". The acclaimed production, which tells the inspiring story of Gloria and Emilio Estefan, finds a new heart with Canela at its core.

Canela has openly shared his profound connection to the musical, stating that the story "always feels like home" when he performs it. This sentiment extends to his experience working in the Philippine theater scene, where he admits to being in "complete awe" of the local talent. He considers his involvement in the Manila production nothing short of a "blessing."

The anticipation for Canela's performance as Emilio Estefan is palpable, with social media sentiments largely positive, reflecting the eagerness of audiences to witness his portrayal. While some typical public debate exists, the overarching mood is one of excitement for what promises to be a vibrant and heartfelt production, celebrating music, heritage, and the universal power of dreams.
postData.title: Jason Canela Brings Heart and Heritage to "On Your Feet!" Manila: A Blessing and a Home
postData.summary: American actor Jason Canela is set to grace the Manila stage as Emilio Estefan in the highly anticipated musical "On Your Feet!". Expressing profound enthusiasm and a sense of "home" with the story, Canela is thrilled to be working alongside Filipino talents, calling the experience a "blessing."

sources.title: Jason Canela joins the cast of 'On Your Feet!' as Emilio Estefan
Jason Canela shares PH theater experience for 'On Your Feet!' | Kapuso Showbiz News
Jason Canela says being part of the PH staging of 'On Your Feet!' is a blessing
